description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per tow, after the CalCOFI-bounding-box filter).
Cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC); FK to cruise for CalCOFI tows.
NODC ship key; FK to ship.
CalCOFI station key in 'line station' form where line and station are numeric.
Point geometry in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) from longitude/latitude.
CalCOFI grid-cell key; FK to grid.
